# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR does in one or two sentences.

## Milestone

Which milestone does this belong to? M0, M1, ..., M9.

## Change type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security

## PRD alignment

- [ ] PRD updated in the same PR if scope changed
- [ ] OpenAPI spec regenerated if endpoints changed
- [ ] Wireframes updated if UI changed

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] E2E tests added or updated if user-facing
- [ ] Drill integrity suite passes if drill paths touched
- [ ] Accessibility checked if UI touched

## Regression gates

- [ ] pytest passes (backend)
- [ ] Vitest passes (frontend)
- [ ] Playwright passes (E2E)
- [ ] axe-core zero violations
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass
- [ ] No em dashes in any changed file
- [ ] No emojis in source files

## State updates

- [ ] BUILD_STATE.md updated if milestone progressed
- [ ] DECISION_LOG.md updated if an architectural decision was made
- [ ] MILESTONE_STATUS.md updated if a gate closed
- [ ] PROJECT_MANIFEST.md updated if phase or version changed

## Reviewer notes

Anything the reviewer should focus on or be aware of.
